sections.paragraph:
Original: גּשׁוּר

Transliteration: geshûr

Phonetic: ghesh-oor'

BDB Definition:

Geshur or Geshurites = "proud beholder"
  1. a people
  2. a land in north Transjordania

Origin: from an unused root (meaning to join)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
